title: George Kuster
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: George Kuster
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

biography: George Kuster earned a B.S in Mathematics with a minor in Psychology from St. Joseph's College, and both an M.S. in Mathematics and a Ph.D in Mathematics from Virginia Tech.
education_entries: Ph D in Mathematics, Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University
MS in Mathematics, Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University
BS in Mathematics, St. Joseph's College
research_interests: His research focuses on the learning and teaching of mathematics; specifically on student thinking and learning in differential equations. In addition to this, he is also interested in the implementation of inquiry-oriented mathematics and its connections to student learning.
teaching_interests: Mathematics and Mathematical thinking and learning.
publications: (2021). Examining students’ variational reasoning in differential equations . Journal of Mathematical Behavior. Volume, 64.
Conference Proceeding (2020). Expert and novice evaluation of generic proofs . Proceedings of the 23rd Annual Conference on Research in Undergraduate Mathemati. Pages, 897-902.

Conference Proceeding (2019). Variational Reasoning Used by Students While Discussing Differential Equations . Proceedings of the 22nd Annual Conference on Research in Undergraduate Mathemati. Pages, 348-356.
(2019). The Inquiry-Oriented Instructional Measure . International Journal of Research in Undergraduate Education. Volume, 5. Issue, 2. Pages, 183-204.
Conference Proceeding (2018). Development of the Inquiry-Oriented Instructional Measure. . Proceedings of the 22st Annual Conference on Research in Undergraduate Mathemati. Pages, 348-356.
Inquiry-oriented instruction: A conceptualization of the instructional components and practices. . PRIMUS/Taylor and Francis. Volume, 28. Issue, 1. Pages, 13-30.

Grants and Sponsored Research: Jean Filetti, George Kuster , Sara Lenhart, Lisa Webb, "Recruiting, Preparing, and Producing STEM Teacher-Scholars: The Christopher Newport University Noyce Scholarship Program," Sponsored by National Science Foundation
Sara Lenhart, George Kuster , Lisa Webb, Jean Filetti, "Preparing Highly-Qualified STEM Teachers: Supporting Student-Centered Instruction," Sponsored by National Science Foundation
